venue.name: Wedding Venue
venue.address: Bhim Rao Ambedkar, Sreepally, </br> Kolkata, North Barrackpur, </br> West Bengal 743122

invitationText:
Together with our parents, grandparents, and the entire extended family, we cordially invite you to be a part of our beautiful new beginning.

As we take our sacred vows amidst the sounding of the Shankha and the blessings of our elders, your esteemed presence and good wishes are what will truly make our celebration complete.

Please join us with your family to share our joy, enjoy the festivities, and bless us as we embark on this lifelong journey of love and togetherness.
thankYouText: Thank you for being part of our happiness.
